package.name: slam_to_mavros
package.description:
Bridges FAST-LIO /Odometry (nav_msgs/Odometry) to PX4 via MAVROS vision-pose topics, so PX4 EKF2 fuses SLAM-based position as its primary odometry source for indoor / GPS-denied flight.
Subscribes: /Odometry (nav_msgs/Odometry, from fast_lio)
Publishes: /mavros/vision_pose/pose (geometry_msgs/PoseStamped) /mavros/vision_speed/speed_twist (geometry_msgs/TwistStamped, optional) TF: map -> odom (static, identity) + odom -> base_link (dynamic, from SLAM)
Direct mode (default): SLAM first-frame origin == PX4 home. Suitable for indoor hand-takeoff with no GPS pre-align. PX4 will set its EKF2 origin to the first received vision pose.
